planning_tasks_dates_order_ck.name: planning_tasks_dates_order_ck
planning_tasks_dates_order_ck.value: "planning_tasks"."date_fin_prevue" IS NULL OR "planning_tasks"."date_debut_prevue" IS NULL OR "planning_tasks"."date_fin_prevue" >= "planning_tasks"."date_debut_prevue"

honoraire_missions_type_valeur_consisten.name: honoraire_missions_type_valeur_consistency_ck
honoraire_missions_type_valeur_consisten.value: ("honoraire_missions"."type_valeur" = 'pct' AND "honoraire_missions"."pct_du_total" IS NOT NULL) OR ("honoraire_missions"."type_valeur" = 'montant' AND "honoraire_missions"."montant_ht" IS NOT NULL)
